results.rendered_html: jyok adv. gaṇa svarādi zu  P. 1,1,37 . lange, noch lange, schon lange: jyokca sūryaṃ dṛśe  ṚV. 1,23,21 . 33,15 . 4,25,4 . jyogabhūvannanudhūpitāsaḥ 2,30,10 . jyogjīvantaḥ 1,136,6 . 10,37,7 .  VS. 36,19 .  ŚAT. BR. 1,2,5,17 . 8,2,16 . 11,5,1,2 .  CHĀND. UP. 2,11,2 . jyokcidatti garbho yadacyutam  ṚV. 6,15,1 . jyokpitṛṣvāstām  AV. 1,14,1 . 19,24,2 . 3 . jyogāmayāvin  TS. 2,1,1,3 . māre asmanmaghavaṃ jyokkaḥ mache nicht lange, zögere nicht  ṚV. 7,22,6 . jyoktamām adv. superl. am längsten: so 'je jyoktamāmivāramata  AIT.
